originContent: # qq-farm-bot-vision
translatedContent: # qq-farm-bot-vision

originContent: # QQ经典农场机器人（AI视觉版本）
translatedContent: # QQ Classic Farm Bot (AI Vision Version)

originContent: ## 基于CV视觉匹配的初版已开发完成，Alaph版本已发布，注意：这是早期测试版本，功能不全还在持续开发和优化中，主要是想让部分用户试用一下，协助测试BUG和提意见。
translatedContent: ## The initial version based on CV visual matching has been developed, the Alaph version has been released. Note: This is an early test version with incomplete features, still under continuous development and optimization, mainly to allow some users to try it out and assist in testing bugs and giving feedback.

originContent: ## 最新功能更新日志请查看：[update_cv.txt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/main/./update_cv.txt)
translatedContent: ## For the latest feature update logs, please check: [update_cv.txt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/main/./update_cv.txt)

originContent: ## 试用过程中遇到问题可提issue：[issue问题区](https://github.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/issues)
translatedContent: ## If you encounter problems during the trial, you can submit issues: [issue section](https://github.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/issues)

originContent: ## 技术交流可以进Discord：[农民交流频道](https://discord.gg/xbpVKG9wKw)
translatedContent: ## For technical communication, join Discord: [Farmer Communication Channel](https://discord.gg/xbpVKG9wKw)

originContent: ## 以下是CV版本的部署试用方法
translatedContent: ## Below is the deployment and trial method for the CV version

originContent: ### 备注：因这是测试版本，会存在很多问题以及功能的缺失，因此暂时不提供docker、exe等一键安装部署的方法使用，仅提供源码启动的方式，供一些有一定技术基础且愿意尝鲜的用户试用，后续待版本更新优化的比较完善且稳定后再提供一键部署的方案给大家使用，望理解
translatedContent: ### Note: Since this is a test version, there are many issues and missing features, so for now, no one-click installation methods like docker or exe are provided; only source code launch is offered for users with certain technical backgrounds willing to try. One-click deployment solutions will be provided after the version is optimized and stable. Thank you for your understanding.

originContent: ## ❗ 用前必读：
translatedContent: ## ❗ Please read before use:

originContent: - 当前版本要求游戏窗口必须实时保持在前台，但可以被遮挡
translatedContent: - The current version requires the game window to always stay in the foreground, but it can be obscured

originContent: - 当前版本已有初版GUI界面，如需使用请启动`python main_gui.py`
translatedContent: - The current version already has an initial GUI interface; if you want to use it, please start `python main_gui.py`

originContent: - 当前版本已实现`自动收菜`、`自动除草/除虫/浇水`、`自动种植（测试中）`、`自动偷菜`、`自动帮忙除草/除虫/浇水`、`自动领取每日免费化肥` 功能，相关功能在不断测试优化中
translatedContent: - The current version has implemented `auto harvest`, `auto weeding/pest removal/watering`, `auto planting (in testing)`, `auto stealing crops`, `auto help with weeding/pest removal/watering`, and `auto claiming daily free fertilizer` functions. These features are continuously tested and optimized.

originContent: - 图像模板匹配可能会因各种因素导致匹配不到或是误匹配情况出现，需要根据使用情况调整相关参数阈值，阈值参数调整方法参考：[threshold_adjust.txt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/main/./threshold_adjust.txt)
translatedContent: - Image template matching may fail or mismatch due to various factors; you need to adjust related threshold parameters based on usage. For threshold adjustment methods, refer to: [threshold_adjust.txt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/main/./threshold_adjust.txt)

originContent: - 设置了按键监听便于快捷控制机器人，快捷键：`Ctrl+c`立马停止并退出机器人，`p` 临时暂停/恢复机器人巡检
translatedContent: - Key listening is set up for quick control of the bot. Hotkeys: `Ctrl+c` immediately stops and exits the bot, `p` temporarily pauses/resumes the bot inspection

originContent: ## 分支说明
translatedContent: ## Branch Description

originContent: - ### ~~[silence-click分支](https://github.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/tree/silence-click)：将点击模式为了静默点击，要求游戏画面仍然在前端，但不会和用户抢鼠标进行点击，注意：这种模式下可能会存在被封号的风险，请各位自行决定是否使用，若使用了希望多观察反馈情况~~ (该分支已合并进main分支)
translatedContent: - ### ~~[silence-click branch](https://github.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/tree/silence-click): Changes the clicking mode to silent click, requires the game screen to remain in front but will not compete with the user for mouse clicks. Note: This mode may carry the risk of account bans, please decide whether to use it yourself. If used, please observe and provide feedback~~ (This branch has been merged into the main branch)

originContent: - ### [gui-pr分支](https://github.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/tree/gui-pr)：该分支提供给大家进行GUI界面的PR，项目默认GUI界面会比较简单，如果你有好的GUI界面设计，可以提交PR到这个分支（目前该分支暂时无提交）
translatedContent: - ### [gui-pr branch](https://github.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/tree/gui-pr): This branch is provided for submitting GUI interface PRs. The default GUI interface of the project is relatively simple. If you have a good GUI design, you can submit a PR to this branch (currently no submissions)

translatedContent: ## GUI Interface Display

originContent: ![GUI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/main/./assert/gui.jpg)
translatedContent: ![GUI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/flh155/qq-farm-bot-vision/main/./assert/gui.jpg)

originContent: ## 系统配置要求
translatedContent: ## System Requirements

originContent: - Windows 10及以上的系统（Linux等其它系统还未开发适配）
translatedContent: - Windows 10 or above (Linux and other systems are not yet supported)

originContent: - 本地已安装Python（推荐使用conda环境），且Python版本 ≥ 3.9
translatedContent: - Local Python installation (conda environment recommended), with Python version ≥ 3.9

originContent: - 已安装NT架构的桌面版QQ，且能打开农场页面
translatedContent: - Installed NT architecture desktop QQ and able to open the farm page

originContent: ## 部署试用流程方法
translatedContent: ## Deployment and Trial Procedure

originContent: - 1、`git clone` 本项目到本地，打开PC版QQ并登录
translatedContent: - 1. `git clone` this project locally, open PC QQ and log in

originContent: - 2、在项目根目录下打开终端（可选：切换conda环境），使用命令 `pip install -r requirement.txt` 安装项目运行所需依赖
translatedContent: - 2. Open a terminal in the project root directory (optional: switch conda environment), use the command `pip install -r requirement.txt` to install the project dependencies

originContent: - 3、检查根目录下 `config.ini` 配置文件，按照个人的需求修改相关配置项参数
translatedContent: - 3. Check the `config.ini` configuration file in the root directory and modify related parameters according to your needs

originContent: - 4、使用命令 `python main.py` 启动机器人，查看终端是否启动成功(GUI界面启动命令为 `python main_gui.py`)
translatedContent: - 4. Use the command `python main.py` to start the bot and check if it starts successfully in the terminal (GUI startup command is `python main_gui.py`)

originContent: - 5、打开农场游戏窗口（注意当前版本必须保证游戏窗口无遮挡）
translatedContent: - 5. Open the farm game window (note the current version requires the game window to be unobstructed)

originContent: - 6、程序会自动控制鼠标点击相关功能按钮实现自动化
translatedContent: - 6. The program will automatically control the mouse to click relevant function buttons to achieve automation

originContent: # 后续研发计划
translatedContent: # Future Development Plans

originContent: - ~~初版实现以cv为基础的图像匹配模式实现收菜、驱虫、除草功能（先快速有一个简版给大家过渡使用）~~（已实现）
translatedContent: - ~~Initial version implements crop harvesting, pest control, and weeding functions based on CV image matching (quickly providing a simple version for everyone to transition)~~ (completed)

originContent: - ~~加入GUI界面，便于使用~~(已实现)
translatedContent: - ~~Added GUI interface for easier use~~ (Implemented)

originContent: - 优化丰富CV匹配版本的功能，修复存在的问题（正在进行中）
translatedContent: - Optimized and enriched the CV matching version features, fixed existing issues (In progress)

originContent: - 采集画面数据集：清洗处理、标注、增强
translatedContent: - Collected screen data sets: cleaning, annotation, augmentation

originContent: - 基于yolo神经网络训练目标检测模型
translatedContent: - Trained target detection model based on YOLO neural network

originContent: - 使用神经网络更加精准及丰富地识别各类图标，丰富功能（种菜、收菜、偷菜、种地等）
translatedContent: - Used neural networks for more accurate and diverse recognition of various icons, enriching functions (planting, harvesting, stealing crops, farming, etc.)

originContent: # 你的star⭐是我更新的动力
translatedContent: # Your star⭐ is my motivation to update

originContent: ## 首先非常感谢大家对项目的关注和star⭐，但是因为本人平时在搬砖，只有摸鱼和下班后才有时间更新和维护项目，且本项目又是从零开始的，所以进度会慢一些，代码质量可能会稍微差一些，希望大家能理解，也欢迎各路大神提PR成为项目贡献者，最后相关开发进度我会及时更新，请大家耐心等待
translatedContent: ## First of all, thank you very much for your attention and star⭐ to the project. However, since I usually work manual labor, I only have time to update and maintain the project during breaks and after work, and this project started from scratch, so the progress will be slower and the code quality might be slightly lower. I hope everyone can understand, and I also welcome experts from all fields to submit PRs and become project contributors. Finally, I will update the development progress in a timely manner, please be patient.

originContent: # 免责声明 ❗
translatedContent: # Disclaimer ❗

originContent: ## 本项目仅供大家作为研究、学习和交流AI与计算机视觉技术应用用途，承诺永久开源免费，严禁任何人直接或间接对项目进行二次开发、包装后进行售卖、宣传等非法用途，且使用本项目可能会违反游戏服务条款导致被封号等处罚，若使用本项目代码则视为你已知晓并同意以上信息，由此造成的一切后果由使用者自行承担，与作者无关。
translatedContent: ## This project is only for research, learning, and communication purposes regarding AI and computer vision technology applications. It is promised to be permanently open-source and free. Any direct or indirect secondary development, repackaging for sale, promotion, or other illegal uses of the project are strictly prohibited. Using this project may violate game service terms and result in account bans or other penalties. By using this project’s code, you acknowledge and agree to the above information. All consequences arising therefrom shall be borne by the user and have nothing to do with the author.
